steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage describes the play as “perhaps the best-known of the few examples of ______” — something rare in literature. The explanation immediately follows: “Most writers prefer working alone, and given that working together cost Hurston and Hughes their friendship, it is not hard to see why.” The blank must name what these writers did together.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Collaboration directly names the joint creative work of multiple writers. The other three choices describe literary techniques (characterization, interpretation) or a commercial process (commercialization), which don't explain why writers typically work alone. That matches choice C — C is correct.
